title: Data Analysis with R Bootcamp
subtitle: Become a Data Analyst using R, Tidyverse & Business Reporting
description: Master R for data cleaning, analysis, visualization, and reporting. Build portfolio projects and become job-ready for analyst roles.

projects.title: Data Cleaning Project with dplyr
projects.description: Transform messy real-world datasets and format columns.

projects.title: Business Metrics Analysis Project
projects.description: Generate KPIs, summarize data, and discover insights.

projects.title: Visualization Project using ggplot2
projects.description: Create professional charts, heatmaps, and customizable reports.

projects.title: Final Portfolio Project
projects.description: End-to-end R analysis report with markdown publishing.

curriculum.title: R Foundations & Data Cleaning

lessons.title: R Basics: Vectors, Matrices, Factors & DataFrames
dplyr verbs: filter, select, mutate, arrange & summarize

curriculum.practice: Clean a messy retail sales dataset with dplyr
curriculum.outcome: Manipulate datasets quickly and create clean data pipelines in R.

curriculum.title: tidyverse & ggplot2 Visualization

lessons.title: Grammar of Graphics: ggplot2 geometries, scales, & themes

curriculum.practice: Create publication-ready charts representing marketing KPIs
curriculum.outcome: Build professional visualizations and custom data plots in R.

curriculum.title: R Markdown & Automated Reporting

lessons.title: Literate Programming: Dynamic documents with R Markdown
Structuring Analyst Reports, Slide Decks & Portfolio Prep

curriculum.practice: Publish a comprehensive HTML/PDF business analysis report
curriculum.outcome: Automate analytical reporting and prepare a job-ready R project portfolio.

features: Learn R + dplyr + ggplot2 + reporting workflows
Work on real-world datasets and case studies
